title: New to Monday - can I rearrange columns in "My Work" table
excerpt: I am new to Monday.com and I want to re-arrange the columns in “My Work” to see the mostimportant information first.

posts.author: Bkavanaugh (Barbra Kavanaugh)
posts.cookedHtml: I am new to Monday.com and I want to re-arrange the columns in “My Work” to see the mostimportant information first.

posts.author: kindertech (KinderTech)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bkavanaugh, unfortunately at the moment monday still does not allow that. Reordering columns on My Work - Feature requests - monday Community Forum
This was from a monday forum a while ago and they had the same issue.
Possible alternative
You could try and create a dashboard that connects multiple boards and filter those views there, it’s not as clean as the my work page but it does give you a bit more freedom.

Let me know if you want any more info on that.
Nathan Kind (nathan@kinder-technologies.com)
Lead Software Consultant - Kinder Tech
